directories.name: Product Hunt
directories.description: Platform for discovering and launching new tech products, offering daily curated lists and community discussions.
directories.notes:
Description from SaaSPedia: "A platform to discover new products and startups."
High traffic, well-known product launch platform. Requires approval process.

directories.name: G2
directories.description: Peer-to-peer review site for software and services with comprehensive comparisons.
directories.notes:
Description from SaaSPedia: "A peer-to-peer review site for software and services."
One of the largest software review platforms. Significant traffic and SEO benefit.

directories.name: Capterra
directories.description: Software comparison and review platform for business solutions.
directories.notes: High authority review site. Helps with SEO and lead generation.

directories.name: SaaSHub
directories.description: Community-driven SaaS comparison site with product reviews and ratings.
directories.notes:
Description from SaaSPedia: "A community-driven SaaS comparison site."
Good for SaaS-specific visibility and community engagement.

directories.name: AlternativeTo
directories.description: Directory for discovering alternatives to popular software and services.
directories.notes: Great for finding alternatives. Strong dofollow links help SEO.

directories.name: BetaList
directories.description: Platform to find and get early access to new startups and products.
directories.notes:
Description from SaaSPedia: "A place to find and get early access to new startups."
Early-stage product focus. Good for pre-launch or beta products.

directories.name: Indie Hackers
directories.description: Community forum for independent developers and entrepreneurs to share projects.
directories.notes:
Description from SaaSPedia: "A forum for independent developers and entrepreneurs."
Great for indie makers and bootstrapped SaaS. Strong community engagement.

directories.name: CrunchBase
directories.description: Database of startups, companies, and funding information.
directories.notes: Excellent for startup visibility and investor connections.

directories.name: AppSumo
directories.description: Deals and discovery platform for software and digital tools.
directories.notes: Popular for deal-based software discovery. Significant traffic.

directories.name: SourceForge
directories.description: Repository for open-source software and project hosting.
directories.notes: High DA, especially good for open-source projects.

directories.name: Brownbook
directories.description: General business directory for local and online businesses.

directories.name: Callupcontact
directories.description: General business directory and contact information platform.

directories.name: Active Search Results
directories.description: Search engine and directory submission site.
directories.notes: Description from SaaSPedia: "A search engine and directory submission site."

directories.name: Viesearch
directories.notes: Description from SaaSPedia: "A human-edited search engine and directory."

directories.name: MedSci AI
directories.description: Directory for AI tools and medical science applications.

directories.description: Curated directory of AI tools and applications.
